positive: A stylized, graphic illustration of a mystical forest scene at dusk. The central subject is a glowing, silhouetted stag with geometric antlers, drinking from a crystalline pond. The background features stylized, intertwined bioluminescent flora and towering, abstract trees with sharp, clean lines. The style is Neo-Art Deco meets mystical stained glass, utilizing deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and warm gold accents. Composition is highly symmetrical and central, suitable for a chest print. Strong, defined contours and solid color blocking are essential. Highly detailed, high contrast, vector art aesthetic, isolated on a solid background.
negative: blur, noise, watermark, signature, text, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, sloppy, dirty, low resolution, photorealistic, 3d render
